summary: Iteration 52: Cumulative Time Log Feature - All backend tests pass (12/12). Frontend verification complete - Time Log section displays correctly with Days Active, Total Time, Avg/Day, Sessions stats and Daily Login Hours chart.

issues: Minor console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - This is a common recharts warning during initial render before container sizes, does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Session tracking endpoints (start/heartbeat/end) work correctly without requiring auth
Time-log API correctly requires guardian auth and validates student ownership
Progress API now includes time_log field with total_days_logged_in, cumulative_seconds, total_sessions
Frontend ProgressTab.jsx correctly fetches time-log data via separate useQuery and displays in Cumulative Time Log section
AuthContext.jsx properly tracks sessions with startSessionTracking on student login and stopSessionTracking on logout
sendBeacon is used for beforeunload to ensure session end is called even when tab closes

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All time log features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test created multiple sessions during backend testing for student SJ
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 tested cumulative time log feature: 1) Backend session endpoints - POST /sessions/start, /sessions/heartbeat, /sessions/end all working without auth. 2) GET /students/{id}/time-log returns aggregated data with daily_logs, total_days_logged_in, cumulative_seconds/display, average_daily_seconds/display, total_sessions. 3) GET /students/{id}/progress now includes time_log field. 4) Frontend ProgressTab shows 'CUMULATIVE TIME LOG' section with 4 stat cards (Days Active, Total Time, Avg/Day, Sessions) and Daily Login Hours bar chart. 5) AuthContext handles session lifecycle - starts on student login, heartbeat every 60s, ends on logout or beforeunload. Student SJ has seeded session data showing 5 days, 7h 56m total time, 23 sessions.

session_start_api.details: POST /api/sessions/start creates new session, returns session_id and started_at

session_heartbeat_api.details: POST /api/sessions/heartbeat updates last_active and duration, returns status=ok and duration_seconds

session_end_api.details: POST /api/sessions/end marks session as ended, returns status=ended and final duration_seconds. Returns already_ended if session was previously ended.

time_log_api.details: GET /api/students/{id}/time-log returns complete aggregated data - requires guardian auth, validates student ownership

progress_includes_time_log.details: GET /api/students/{id}/progress includes time_log object with total_days_logged_in, cumulative_seconds, total_sessions

frontend_time_log_section.details: ProgressTab shows CUMULATIVE TIME LOG section with 4 stat cards: Days Active (5), Total Time (7h 56m), Avg/Day (1h 35m), Sessions (23)

frontend_daily_chart.details: Daily Login Hours bar chart displays correctly with date labels (03-07 to 03-11) and hour values on Y-axis

frontend_empty_state.details: Did not test empty state for student with no sessions - would show 'No login sessions recorded yet' message

auth_context_session_tracking.details: AuthContext.jsx properly manages session lifecycle - startSessionTracking on login, heartbeat interval every 60s, stopSessionTracking on logout, sendBeacon on beforeunload
